title: Magic Stone (魔咒石)
description: Choose the Magic Stones you like to explore the world!
body:
# Intro:

   This mod is based on the worldview of 'Ancient Legend'.It can be said to be its extended mod. In 'Ancient Legend', humans and magic ghosts wew in a state of conflict.After death , humans become magic ghosts, but all magic ghosts are subject to a non-human regime called the 'Ghost Clan Royal'. In order to resist this regime, humans need to rely on the power of magic to try to change everything 'King of Ghost' created. But not all humans are born with the ability to use magic, and the cost of using the 'Curse Altar' to obtain magical power is too heavy. The Magic Stone emerged as a result...

The ideal for people is to use magic stones from other worlds to fight against magic ghosts and become a qualified wizard.


## Features:

1. More than 20 types of magic stones.
2. New dimension and new biome.
3. Many playing methods.(Magic Ghost, Abyss, Disaster Quelling, Undying ...) 
4. Many new structures.
5. New mobs.
6. New items.



## Types of Magic :

1. Basic
2. Intermediate
3. Advanced
4. Master
5. Despicable
6. Taboo
7. Origin

## Magic Levels:

- L1:Basic
- L2:Intermediate
- L3:Advanced
- L4:Master
- L5:Despicable,Taboo and so on...
- L6:Origin

## Music:

[Whispers of the Flower Sea - Shion](https://www.bilibili.com/audio/au4922608?type=1)

### Mod Demo:

[Version 1.6.1](https://b23.tv/LpMwUOm)
